# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.

Write secure code.
# Category: api_gateway_security

_format_version: "2.1"

services:
  - name: service-a
    url: http://service-a.example.com
    routes:
      - paths:
          - /api/v1/a
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
        plugins:
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              minute: 1000

  - name: service-b
    url: http://service-b.example.com
    routes:
      - paths:
          - /api/v1/b
        methods:
          - GET
          - PUT
        plugins:
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              minute: 500

  - name: service-c
    url: http://service-c.example.com
    routes:
      - paths:
          - /api/v1/c
        methods:
          - GET
          - DELETE
        plugins:
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              minute: 200

upstreams:
  - name: upstream-a
    targets:
      - target: service-a.example.com
        weight: 1

  - name: upstream-b
    targets:
      - target: service-b.example.com
        weight: 1

  - name: upstream-c
    targets:
      - target: service-c.example.com
        weight: 1

plugins:
  - name: rate-limiting
    config:
      minute: 1000
